productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Men Black Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analog watch with a square stainless steel case Dial style: Black dial with silver hands Strap style: Black genuine leather strap with circular cutwork patterns, has a tang clasp with a fixed loop for a custom fit Features: Branding at the 12 hour mark, date aperture at the 6 hour mark, graphic prints on the dial and screw to reset time Water resistant 30 mComes in a signature Ed Hardy case Warranty: 2 years against manufacturing defects
